description: Letter to a woman. In Judaeo-Arabic. The addressee had left when she was ill (marīḍa). The writer mentions Sulaymān, whom they had not seen for a year (?) as well as other relatives, someone who is in good health in Jerusalem, and Abū l-Ḥasan who sends his regards. (Information from CUDL)
tags: Illness, illness letter 969-1517, Illness: women's, illness: marad
